chain_commits.description: Add s7 D1 cross-asset Donchian Step 02b alt-vendor data-fetch plan
Add s7 D1 Donchian Step 02c next-phase plan
Seal s7 D1 Donchian Step 02c raw-data audit (verdict PASS)
Add s7 D1 Donchian Step 03 canonical-loader specification plan
Build s7 D1 Donchian Step 03 canonical loader (verdict PASS)
Add s7 D1 Donchian Step 04 input-validator specification plan
Build s7 D1 Donchian Step 04 input validator (verdict PASS)
Add s7 D1 Donchian Step 05 signal-computation specification plan
Build s7 D1 Donchian Step 05 signal module (verdict PASS)
Add s7 D1 Donchian Step 06 simulator specification plan
Build s7 D1 Donchian Step 06 simulator (verdict PASS)
Add s7 D1 Donchian Step 07 result-aggregation specification plan
Build s7 D1 Donchian Step 07 result aggregator (verdict PASS; first IS verdict REJECT_FAST)

honest_interpretation.diversification_hypothesis_note: Cross-family diversification with avg pairwise dependence 0.041 and effective independent bets 3.56 EMPIRICALLY VALIDATES the load-bearing hypothesis from spec section 1 H1. This is a real positive finding from the s2-s7 research arc even though the strategy itself did not survive cost stress.
honest_interpretation.live_trading_implication: NONE. Live trading remains blocked at six gates regardless of any in-sample verdict.
honest_interpretation.money_proven_note: Per spec sec 14 K12, REJECT_FAST is a terminal IS-side verdict. Per the threshold-lock invariant, loosening any K threshold post-seal is forbidden. The strategy is not money-proven at this spec pinning.
honest_interpretation.oos_not_inspected_note: Out-of-sample data exists on disk (2023-01-03 through 2025-12-30) but was never inspected. The K12 fire on the in-sample cost-stress matrix triggered the fail-fast path before any OOS authorization could be considered. OOS remains structurally blocked at separate plans.
honest_interpretation.trading_edge_robustness: Not robust enough. The +$589 net PnL on $100k over ~9 in-sample years is technically positive but trivially small relative to the 69.10% trade-curve max drawdown. The edge does not survive realistic transaction cost stress (DR2/DR3 fire).
honest_interpretation.uneven_per_market_performance: USO contributed +$96,538 single-handedly; SPY, TLT, and GLD were all net losers. A diversified PORTFOLIO that depends on ONE market for its PnL is not a diversified edge; it is concentrated single-market risk wearing a portfolio costume.

reason_for_rejection.cost_stress_failure_summary: S2 and/or S3 cost-stress tier net PnL materially degrades vs S1 baseline (DR2). S0 baseline shows positive PnL while at least one stressed tier turns non-positive (DR3). The locked Faith System 1 mechanic does not survive cost stress on the ETF-proxy in-sample window at the parent-spec parameter pinning.

recommended_next_actions.action: Move to the next research track
recommended_next_actions.description: The s7 D1 ETF-proxy candidate is terminally parked. The diversification hypothesis is validated; the next research track should preserve that finding and explore a different edge family or a different parameterization that requires its OWN fresh sealed spec (per the threshold-lock invariant in parent spec section 14).

Append a one-paragraph lesson to brain_memory/projects/trading_bot/lessons.md and a decision to brain_memory/projects/trading_bot/decisions.md and a next action to brain_memory/projects/trading_bot/next_actions.md per CLAUDE.md guidance. These files were NOT touched this turn or any prior turn; the hard boundaries forbid modifying them without explicit authorization.

Step 02c audit finding F1 (manifest divergence-metric clarification) remains documented but untouched. A separate authorization could choose: (a) re-author Step 02c plan section 10 J1 with corrected metric description, (b) add an absolute-divergence field to fetch_run_manifest.json alongside the existing relative field, or (c) accept the F1 finding as documented and proceed without further change.

This park report is a terminal artifact for the s7 D1 ETF-proxy track. No future phase of this chain is auto-authorized. Each onward step requires an explicit fresh operator authorization in the established controller-session pattern. The chain is closed at this commit.

seal_method: sha256 over json.dumps(obj, sort_keys=True, separators=(",",":"), ensure_ascii=False) EXCLUDING report_seal_sha256 + seal_method
